channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Tuesday, April 28, 2026
item.description: Three threads converge today that deserve your full attention, Midya. First, the Musk v. Altman trial is now live testimony — this isn't just tech drama; it's a landmark case about who controls the direction of the most powerful AI systems on earth, and it will shape the regulato...
